patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (patient ID 104). Key active problems documented: mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, and postoperative/unspecified anemia (visit diagnoses 06/30/2023). Important procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy performed/scheduled on 02/21/2025 (peri-op documented). Critical data: 07/03/2023 labs show iron 41 (low), iron saturation 15% (low), ferritin 266.8 (high) and eGFR 58 ml/min/1.73m2; lipid panel same date shows triglycerides 158 (high) and LDL 62 mg/dL. Multiple care team members listed including primary care (Hand, Hoyet A, MD) and cardiology. Social history includes conflicting tobacco records (former vs documented 'every day' in one source). Functional assessments vary by date with some contradictory responses for dressing/bathing and errands. Overall, outpatient follow-up is active with multiple upcoming specialty appointments and a recent peri-operative colonoscopy.
